name: Standard Chartered Super Value Titanium Credit Card
exclusions: telephone and utility cashback require use of Standard Chartered bill pay platforms and transaction thresholds
fuel cashback only on transactions of INR 2,000 or below
1% fuel surcharge waiver on this card has been discontinued
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversal on meeting INR 90,000 spends
additionalBenefits: 5% cashback on fuel up to INR 200 per month
5% cashback on phone bills up to INR 200 per month
5% cashback on utility bills up to INR 100 per month
1 reward point per INR 150 on other spends

salaried: Minimum monthly income of INR 55,000 is required
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Standard Chartered approval criteria
